title: Custom photo cakes for Westmead and Merrylands — 100% eggless, every time
summary:
A photo cake from Num Nums is a custom design on your chosen flavour — Rasmalai, Mango, Red Velvet, any of the 15. No eggs in the sponge, no eggs in the buttercream. That's not a specialty option at this bakery. That's the only kind we make.

Families in Westmead and Merrylands order here because they stop having to ask. One vegetarian at the table, one Jain household rule, one egg allergy — none of it requires a workaround. The cake covers everyone.

Photo add-on: $19.99. Six sizes starting at $39.99 for a 6-inch, which serves 6 to 8 people. 48 hours minimum notice. Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park — 10 minutes from Westmead or Merrylands Station.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725
keywords: custom photo cake eggless Harris Park
eggless cake for vegetarian Jain family near Westmead
